productDisplayName: Lotus Herbals Women Clay White Black Clay Skin Whitening Face Pack
description: What it is:Lotus Herbals Clay White is a skin whitening face pack.What it does:Black clay, which is highly rich in silica and minerals helps the skin get clearerThis facial pack also contains liquorice extract and bearberry extract, which is quite rich in arbutin.Components help to lighten and brighten up the skin.
